  chown -R "0:0" /opt/solr-$SOLR_VERSION /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d /opt/docker-solr;   chown -R "$SOLR_USER:0" /var/solr;   { command -v gpgconf; gpgconf --kill all || :; };   rm -r "$GNUPGHOME"
